summary: Cathy O'Neil announces an event celebrating the revival of Science For The People, a publication returning after nearly 30 years. The event features a mini-documentary about the organization's revitalization and readings from their new essay collection on geoengineering. This is a brief promotional post directing readers to the NYC event.
key_points: Science For The People is publishing again after a hiatus since 1989
Their first new publication focuses on the science and politics of geoengineering
A mini-documentary about the organization's revival will premiere at the event
money_quotes: Celebrate the return of Science for the People!
key_insight: Science For The People, a publication examining the intersection of science and politics, has been revived after nearly three decades.
